summary: Documentation pass for action modifiers. Rewrote user-facing error handling docs to describe the new error.handle modifier, added new module pages for cache/timeout/timer. Updated architecture, execution-flow, goals-steps, good_to_know, build_process, and building_plang_tests in Documentation/v0.2/ to remove stale Step.OnError/Cache/Timeout and error.check/cache.check/cache.store references, and added a new Action Modifiers section describing the fold and builder grouping. Filled small XML doc gaps on timer.start, timer.end, and ModifierAttribute.Order. Recorded the three accepted security-backlog items and the GoalCall clone-not-mutate rule in good_to_know.md so future work surfaces them.

changes.description: Rewrote 'on error' section: per-action scope, filters (StatusCode/Key/Message), retry + retry budget, error-goal call, Order (RetryFirst/GoalFirst), IgnoreError fallback, %!error% parameter. Kept throw section.
New user doc for cache.wrap modifier: DurationMs/Sliding/Key, default key scheme (step:{goalPath}:{index}), success-only, shared-by-reference caveat.
New user doc for timeout.after modifier: 408 Timeout error shape, cooperative cancellation, nested composition, parent-cancellation passthrough.
New user doc for timer.sleep, timer.start, timer.end with parameters, error shapes, and examples.
Added timer to Core and a new 'Action Modifiers' bucket. Brief explanation of the modifier pattern.
Removed OnError/Cache from the Step.Merge field list; noted Modifiers travel inside Actions.

Removed Step.OnError/Cache/Timeout from entity block; added Modifiers to Action block; rewrote Error Handling to describe error.handle modifier (ErrorHandler class deleted). Added new 'Action Modifiers' section with shape, runtime fold, IModifier, builder grouping, and how to add a modifier.
Rewrote run.pr flow diagram to drop error.check/cache.check/cache.store; rewrote Section 6 (Error Flow) around per-action error.handle modifier; removed step.OnError reference.
Removed OnError/Cache/Timeout rows from Step table; added Modifiers row to Action table; added pointer note that error/cache/timeout are per-action modifiers.

Updated GoalFirst note to point at PLang/App/modules/error/handle.cs (old file deleted). Fixed Step.Merge field list. Removed stale ErrorHandler references in global-usings section. Added three new sections: Action Modifiers — Fold + Grouping, GoalCall — Clone Never Mutate, Modifier Hardening Backlog.
Removed onError/cache from Step Properties; added modifiers to Action Properties; noted GroupModifiers runs in GoalsSave pipeline so runtime gets a pre-sorted fold.
Reworded common LLM failures and verification checklists from onError/cache JSON properties to modifier-action grouping. Updated sample .pr shape.
Added class-level summary describing stopwatch semantics and Name/Scope behaviour.
Added class-level summary including the two ValidationError shapes (no-timer-started, unknown-name).
Added Order property docstring listing the current assignments: timeout=1, cache=2, error=3.

findings.issue: Class-level XML summary missing — timer.start had no description of stopwatch semantics.
Class-level XML summary missing — timer.end had no description of return type or error shapes.
findings.detail: Added class-level summary covering elapsed TimeSpan return and the two ValidationError shapes.

findings.issue: Order property had no XML docstring.
findings.detail: Added docstring listing current assignments (timeout=1, cache=2, error=3).

findings.issue: User-facing error handling doc described step-level `on error` syntax, which is deleted.
findings.detail: Rewrote to describe error.handle modifier with filters, retry, goal call, ordering, and %!error% parameter.

findings.issue: No user-facing doc for the new cache.wrap modifier.
findings.detail: New page covering DurationMs/Sliding/Key, default key scheme, success-only storage, and shared-by-reference caveat.

findings.issue: No user-facing doc for the new timeout.after modifier.
findings.detail: New page covering 408 error shape, cooperative cancellation, nesting, and parent cancellation.

findings.issue: No user-facing doc for the new timer module (sleep/start/end).
findings.detail: New page covering all three actions with parameters and examples.

findings.issue: Index missed the three new user-facing modules (cache, timeout, timer).
findings.detail: Added timer to Core and a new 'Action Modifiers' bucket with brief explanation of the modifier pattern.

findings.issue: Step block listed deleted .Timeout/.OnError/.Cache; Action block missed .Modifiers; Error Handling section referenced deleted ErrorHandler class.
findings.detail: Updated entity blocks; rewrote Error Handling; added full Action Modifiers section.

findings.issue: Sections 2 and 6 referenced deleted error.check / cache.check / cache.store / step.OnError.
findings.detail: Rewrote run.pr flow diagram and Section 6 around per-action error.handle modifier.

findings.issue: Step properties table listed deleted OnError/Cache/Timeout; Action table missed Modifiers.
findings.detail: Removed deleted rows; added Modifiers row to Action; added pointer note.

findings.issue: GoalFirst note pointed at deleted Step/Methods.cs:HandleErrorAsync(); Step.Merge field list listed deleted Cache/OnError; global-using-aliases section referenced deleted ErrorHandler class alias.
findings.detail: Updated pointer, field list, and aliases; added three new sections (Action Modifiers fold + grouping, GoalCall clone-not-mutate pattern from auditor F1, Modifier Hardening Backlog from security v1).

findings.issue: Step Properties table listed deleted onError/cache; Action Properties table missed modifiers; no mention of GroupModifiers in save pipeline.
findings.detail: Updated both tables and noted GroupModifiers in the GoalsSave description.

findings.issue: Builder-failure checklist and sample .pr shape referenced deleted onError/cache JSON properties.
findings.detail: Reworded checklists around modifier-action grouping; updated sample .pr shape.
